title: cosmos montanus var. typicus
intro: Cosmos montanus var. typicus, also known as the mountain cosmos, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of China and Japan. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cosmos montanus var. typicus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for colds, fever, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried flowers can be used in herbal remedies and traditional Chinese medicine.
